R Notebook

responses <- read_csv("~/Downloads/Social Networks Survey (Responses) - Form Responses 1.csv")

responses <- responses %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(id = row_number())
cleaned_df <- network_long %>% 
  select(ego_id, 
         date = what_is_todays_date, 
         ego_gender = what_is_your_gender_fill_out_information_for_your_partner_not_yourself,
         ego_age = how_old_are_you,
         ego_classyear = what_is_your_class_year,
         ego_origin  = where_are_you_from,
         ego_ai = in_the_past_12_months_have_you_used_ai_e_g_chat_gpt_on_coursework_in_a_way_that_violated_the_rules_of_a_class,
         alter_id = alter,
         alter_classyear = class,
         alter_gender = gender,
         alter_origin = origin,
         alter_age = age,
         alter_ai = ai)


write_csv(cleaned_df,  here("labs", "data", "homophily_survey.csv"))
